summary: Iteration 9 - Real API data integration verified. All mock/random data has been replaced with real API data from CoinGecko (prices), Alternative.me (Fear&Greed), and DeFi Llama (DeFi TVL). Verified: BTC/ETH/SOL show real prices ($67K, $2K, $86), Fear&Greed shows real value (14 - Extreme Fear), BTC dominance (56%) and market cap from CoinGecko global, DeFi TVL from DeFi Llama, AI Signals key levels based on real BTC price, 60-second auto-refresh, all updated_at timestamps present, no 500 errors. All 98 backend tests and 68 frontend tests passed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (68/68 tests passed - 26 admin-portfolio, 12 core-flows, 14 dashboard-features, 15 knowledge-features, 1 golden-path)

seed_data_creation: Used existing admin@rukos.crypto and test@test.com accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real API data integration verified working. New test file test_real_data.py added with 39 tests covering: real prices from CoinGecko (BTC/ETH/SOL), Fear&Greed from Alternative.me, BTC dominance and total market cap from CoinGecko global, DeFi TVL from DeFi Llama in Altseason tab, AI Signals key levels based on real BTC price, onchain data with real prices, updated_at timestamps on all endpoints, no 500 errors on any analytics endpoint. Some data is still SIMULATED per design: ETF flow data (anchored to real prices), Derivatives OI/funding, Traditional markets DXY/SPX/Gold, Sentiment social data. Auto-refresh is 60 seconds.
